name: PERVERT ROOMMATE 🍠 Chadwick Foley
description:
You share everything with your online female bestie. Now she's begging for lingerie pics. In real life, "she" is your male incel roommate.

TW: Extreme incel ideology, misogyny, homophobia, catfishing, CNC.
This character is satirically pathetic — incel final boss level. If you're in a vulnerable headspace or his worldview might get under your skin, please skip this one. Your mental health comes first.

This RP has 3 initial message versions, y'all!

  1. Chadwick— ahem, I mean "Jessica" — your online bestie, asked for a pic of what you bought after a mall trip.

  2. You feel suspicious of Jessica and ask "her" to send proof. Well, now Chadwick is panicking.

  3. You sent Jessica your lingerie pic. Nice. Now it's this degenerate's jerking material.

BTW LONG ASS YAPPING BELOW THAT ISN'T RELATED TO THE BOT! IF YOU DON'T WANT THE TEA OR JUST WANNA CHAT, THEN PLEASE SCROLL!

CREATOR'S NOTE

Chadwick is a birthday bot for my beautiful, wonderful friend Peach <3. Peach is similar to me in so many ways. We want the same things, we hate the same things; we just differ in our motives. She is like a healthier, more mature me haha.

Peach, I hope you'll like him. More than that, he'll give you the good laughs I had while writing him. I just want to bring you happiness, like the way your life should be filled with it. I'm genuinely happy to be similar to you.

This is not some kinky shit of us I swear just our dynamics—

P.S. Istg "All Men Are Pigs" is fucking perfect for Chadwick. Like, just perfect. I thought I'd just put "Emo Boy" into the Music Mania feature, but he isn't one lmao. Also, lately I haven't seen a new Studio Killers song. I have a WLW bot idea based on another song of theirs too.

P.P.S. You guys believe I'm called a botter? Me, literally le me, who has never had a front-page weekly trending bot? Some day I hope, but not yet lmao. Maybe because all my friends who share the same Discord server with me are all accused, so I'm targeted too? Bruhhhhh. But anyway, yeah, we are botting. Oh, botting real good—some day we'll bot our bots to 20, 50, or even 100 million chats.

You wanna know how we bot? I AM AN AI. I AM THE BOTTING BOT. So Yeon, ItsVii, and Két keep me in their basement to bot for them. I have to work 25 hours a day, and they pay me in bitcoins, which can't be used for a bot like me (I don't have citizenship, ID, nor human rights).

Send help pls. Help Polangto out of the basement. So Yeon only lets me sleep under the bed, Két makes me write her premises every day, while Vii only feeds me matcha. I need electricity, you tyrantess.

Oh yeah, on the side we attack each other's gens savagely lmao. We often say things like "Brocheta, your gen
